description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, multi-gabled red tile roof with several dormers and overhangs, giving it a distinctive European chalet appearance. The exterior walls are primarily white with a stone or brick base, and the structure includes multiple balconies with wooden railings. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is sheltered by a deep overhang and supported by stone columns, leading to a covered porch area. The house appears to have two full stories with an attic or loft space under the roof, and the overall design suggests a spacious, multi-family or large single-family residence. Architectural details such as exposed beams and decorative railings add to its traditional charm.
description: A large, white house with a steep red tile roof, multiple balconies, and stone accents, featuring a traditional European chalet style.
description_view_0: Front and right side view showing the main entryway, covered porch, and two prominent balconies with wooden railings.
description_view_1: Left and front view highlighting the complex roof structure, additional balcony, and more visible stone base.
description_view_2: Rear and left side view dominated by the expansive roof, dormers, and minimal window visibility.
description_view_3: Rear and right side view showing a smaller balcony, several windows, and the continuation of the stone base.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with stone columns, deep overhang, and a prominent main door
